rationale: Both reviews independently catch the two decisive API issues (missing @[simp] on map_proj, over-exposed fiberHomeomorph helpers); Review 1 offers better remediation guidance for fiberHomeomorph (private OR add group-homo lemmas), while Review 2 adds a third finding about applySubgroupContinuousConstSMul that is grounded but of limited consequence since making a Lean instance private rarely improves usability. The resulting PRs from following either review would be nearly identical in quality.
